text:
This research explores the implementation of text-rich environments in early childhood education (PAUD) and evaluates their subsequent impact on children's language development. Adopting a qualitative case study approach, the study was conducted at PAUD Shafa Marwah, with data gathered through direct observation, semi-structured interviews, and comprehensive documentation. The findings indicate that the integration of text-rich surroundings has been successfully executed, with children demonstrating a profound interest in available reading materials and engaging actively with textual stimuli. This immersion has yielded significant positive outcomes for language acquisition, specifically enhancing vocabulary retention, reading comprehension, and oral communication skills.

Keywords: Text-rich environment; language development; early childhood education
